nodes.label: AI-Memory System
nodes.description: A knowledge management system that ingests, processes, and stores information with architectural decisions governing its operation.

nodes.label: Markdown Conversion
nodes.description: Process of converting raw binary formats (PDF, DOCX, audio, video) to Markdown before ingestion into the system.

nodes.label: Sources Directory
nodes.description: Immutable folder containing original ingested files that preserve provenance and are never edited after creation.

nodes.label: Wiki Directory
nodes.description: Folder containing synthesized, editable knowledge pages derived from source materials.

nodes.label: Frontmatter Schema
nodes.description: Standardized metadata structure required for all files including title, type, tags, created date, and type-specific fields.

nodes.label: Tag Namespacing Convention
nodes.description: System for organizing tags using namespace prefixes (type/*, source-type/*, status/*) for structural tags and free-form lowercase-kebab for domain tags.

nodes.label: File Naming Convention
nodes.description: Standard for naming files using lowercase-kebab-case with date prefixes for session logs and no version numbers in filenames.

nodes.label: MCP Data Contract
nodes.description: Minimum viable interface specification requiring read, search, filter, write, and update capabilities for AI tools interacting with the vault.

nodes.label: basic-memory
nodes.description: MCP server that serves as the primary tool for interacting with the vault, supporting all required data contract operations.

nodes.label: Processing Location Strategy
nodes.description: Decision framework specifying where different content types should be processed (Mac vs Netcup server) based on computational requirements.

nodes.label: pymupdf4llm
nodes.description: Primary PDF-to-Markdown converter chosen for its speed and compatibility, replacing Marker due to Apple Silicon MPS bugs.

nodes.label: Marker
nodes.description: Previous PDF converter tool that was replaced due to surya dependency issues with Apple Silicon MPS acceleration.

nodes.label: LLM Model Selection Strategy
nodes.description: Decision framework assigning specific Claude models to different tasks based on cost-quality tradeoffs.

nodes.label: claude-haiku-4-5
nodes.description: Fast and cost-effective Claude model used for routing, tagging, and triage tasks.

nodes.label: claude-sonnet-4-6
nodes.description: Balanced Claude model used for summarization and cross-referencing tasks.

nodes.label: claude-opus-4-7
nodes.description: High-quality Claude model reserved for visual extraction and complex synthesis tasks.

nodes.label: Graphify
nodes.description: Knowledge-graph pipeline that generates machine-produced artifacts including graph.json, explorer HTML, and analysis reports.

nodes.label: Graphs Directory
nodes.description: Machine-generated artifact folder containing Graphify outputs that are exempt from standard frontmatter and naming conventions.

nodes.label: Vector Systems
nodes.description: Text-optimized systems that benefit from pre-converted Markdown format for faster processing.

nodes.label: Format Conversion Tools
nodes.description: Tooling dependencies required to convert non-Markdown source files before ingestion.

nodes.label: Git Version Control
nodes.description: System used for tracking file history and syncing vault contents across locations.

nodes.label: Obsidian
nodes.description: Knowledge management tool that benefits from the tag namespacing convention and Graphify interactive explorer.

nodes.label: Netcup Server
nodes.description: Server infrastructure used for compute-heavy processing tasks like transcription, visual extraction, and URL scraping.

nodes.label: docling
nodes.description: IBM tool being evaluated as a potential unified PDF and document converter to replace current solutions.
